title: Share Your Views Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: The ability to learn, understand, and think about things.
rounds.answer: intelligence
rounds.explanation: intelligence: The ability to learn, understand, and think about things.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Not guilty of doing anything wrong; pure.
rounds.answer: innocent
rounds.explanation: innocent: Not guilty of doing anything wrong; pure.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A great victory or success.
rounds.answer: triumph
rounds.explanation: triumph: A great victory or success.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A doctor who helps people stay healthy and treats them when sick.
rounds.answer: physician

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.answer: decent

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: The act of going down or lowering.
rounds.answer: descent

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: Her intelligence helped her solve the tricky problem.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The ancient castle has stood for hundreds of years.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The innocent puppy just wanted to play.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Temple of One Step, part 3': A visiting _____ from the national museum nodded with interest.
rounds.answer: geographer
rounds.explanation: The text says: A visiting geographer from the national museum nodded with interest.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'Share Your Views: source text 1': It is about two young students, Sami and Nadia, who investigate an _____ temple and discover that real power comes...
rounds.answer: ancient
rounds.explanation: The text says: It is about two young students, Sami and Nadia, who investigate an ancient temple and discover that real power comes not from climbing high, but from thinking deeply.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'Share Your Views: source text 2': Third, a garden makes the school more _____.
rounds.answer: magnificent
rounds.explanation: The text says: Third, a garden makes the school more magnificent.

rounds.answer: Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 1: Present Your Views
rounds.target: Every school should have a garden.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 3: Vocabulary Expert Interview
rounds.target: The ancient castle has stood for hundreds of years.

rounds.target: The innocent puppy just wanted to play.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: We had a ceremony to celebrate our school's anniversary.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The project has three phases: planning, building, finishing.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: In physics class, we learned how gravity pulls things down.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'decent' mean in this unit?
choices: The ability to learn, understand, and think about things.
A doctor who helps people stay healthy and treats them when sick.
rounds.answer: Good enough or acceptable.
rounds.explanation: decent: Good enough or acceptable.

rounds.prompt: What does 'descent' mean in this unit?
choices: The ability to learn, understand, and think about things.
A doctor who helps people stay healthy and treats them when sick.
The act of going down or lowering.
rounds.answer: The act of going down or lowering.
rounds.explanation: descent: The act of going down or lowering.

rounds.prompt: What does 'physician' mean in this unit?
choices: Very old; from a long time ago.
A doctor who helps people stay healthy and treats them when sick.
The ability to learn, understand, and think about things.
rounds.answer: A doctor who helps people stay healthy and treats them when sick.
rounds.explanation: physician: A doctor who helps people stay healthy and treats them when sick.

games.title: Word Type Power
games.description: Identify how each vocabulary word works in English.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'cycle'?
rounds.answer: Noun
rounds.explanation: cycle is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'hemisphere'?
rounds.answer: Noun
rounds.explanation: hemisphere is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'central'?
rounds.answer: Adjective
rounds.explanation: central is used as a adjective in this dictionary sense.

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 1.
pairs: A doctor who helps people stay healthy and treats them when sick.
Very old; from a long time ago.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 2.
pairs: A special event where people celebrate something important.
Something that shows whether something is true or real.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 3.
pairs: The act of going down or lowering.
The study of how things move and work, like forces and energy.
Related to the law or the courts.

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

rounds.prompt: What does 'geographer' mean?
choices: A person who studies maps and the Earth's features.
The most important part or the middle of something.
rounds.answer: A person who studies maps and the Earth's features.
rounds.explanation: The geographer showed us how to read a map.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Temple of One Step, part 2': “_____ meant knowing the stars, the land, and the law.” Miss Sarah smiled.
rounds.answer: Citizenship
rounds.explanation: The text says: “Citizenship meant knowing the stars, the land, and the law.” Miss Sarah smiled.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'Share Your Views: source text 2': A _____ from the National Health Board has also stated that children who eat fresh vegetables have stronger bodies...
rounds.answer: physician
rounds.explanation: The text says: A physician from the National Health Board has also stated that children who eat fresh vegetables have stronger bodies and better concentration.

games.title: Unit Mission
games.description: Finish with a mixed challenge across the whole unit.

rounds.prompt: What does 'intelligence' mean?
choices: A doctor who helps people stay healthy and treats them when sick.
A person who studies maps and the Earth's features.
The ability to learn, understand, and think about things.
Very old; from a long time ago.
rounds.answer: The ability to learn, understand, and think about things.
rounds.explanation: Her intelligence helped her solve the tricky problem.

rounds.prompt: What does 'citizenship' mean?
choices: A person who studies maps and the Earth's features.
The status of being a member of a country with rights and responsibilities.
Very old; from a long time ago.
rounds.answer: The status of being a member of a country with rights and responsibilities.
rounds.explanation: Citizenship means you can vote and go to school.

rounds.prompt: What does 'physician' mean?
choices: A doctor who helps people stay healthy and treats them when sick.
The most important part or the middle of something.
Very old; from a long time ago.
rounds.answer: A doctor who helps people stay healthy and treats them when sick.
rounds.explanation: The physician gave me medicine to feel better.
